name: pytorch
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        pytorch /

      pytorch  

    
      Tensors and Dynamic neural networks in Python with strong GPU acceleration
summary: PyTorch 是一个基于 Python 的深度学习框架，支持动态计算图和强大的 GPU 加速。它因其灵活易用的设计、活跃的社区和广泛的应用（如研究、工业部署）而备受关注。

name: codex-plugin-cc
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        openai /

      codex-plugin-cc  

    
      Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.
summary: 该项目是OpenAI官方开发的插件，允许在Claude Code中直接调用Codex进行代码审查或任务委派，值得关注因为它打通了OpenAI与Anthropic两大AI生态，实现跨模型协作。

name: cs249r_book
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        harvard-edge /

      cs249r_book  

    
      Machine Learning Systems
summary: 该项目是哈佛大学开设的“机器学习系统”课程配套教材，系统讲解从算法到硬件部署的完整技术栈，因其前沿的课程内容和开源实践价值而备受关注。

name: safishamsi
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        safishamsi /

      graphify  

    
      AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.
summary: 该项目是一个AI编程助手技能，能将任意代码、SQL、文档等文件夹转化为可查询的知识图谱，值得关注因为它统一了应用代码、数据库和基础设施，极大提升开发效率。

name: claude-code
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        anthropics /

      claude-code  

    
      Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.
summary: Claude Code 是一个运行在终端中的智能编码助手，能通过自然语言指令理解代码库、执行常规任务、解释复杂代码并处理 Git 工作流，值得关注因为它将强大的 AI 代理能力直接集成到开发者日常使用的命令行环境中，大幅提升编码效率。

name: CubeSandbox
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        TencentCloud /

      CubeSandbox  

    
      Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.
summary: CubeSandbox 是腾讯云开源的轻量级 AI 智能体沙箱，支持即时、并发、安全地运行代码，因其高性能与强隔离性，值得关注。

name: msitarzewski
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        msitarzewski /

      agency-agents  

    
      A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
summary: 该项目是一个“全能AI代理机构”，集成了从前端开发到社交媒体运营等各类专业AI代理，每个代理都具备独特个性与交付能力，值得关注因为它提供了一套开箱即用的多角色AI协作解决方案。

name: JuliusBrussee
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        JuliusBrussee /

      caveman  

    
      🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman
summary: 该项目是一个Claude Code技能，通过让AI用“穴居人”风格说话，能减少65%的token消耗，值得关注是因为它用幽默方式大幅降低API使用成本。
